summary: Comercial (Ventas y Reservas) module testing complete. Backend: 15/15 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features working - Ventas/Reservas tabs, KPI cards, Top 10 tables, Detail table with pagination, date/catalog filters. SECURITY ISSUE: comercial endpoints missing authentication (Depends(get_current_user)).

critical.issue: All 3 comercial endpoints missing authentication - endpoints are publicly accessible without Bearer token
critical.fix: Add 'user=Depends(get_current_user)' to all endpoint function signatures in /app/backend/routers/comercial.py

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/comercial/summary (SALE) returns kpis, top_productos, top_clientes
Backend: GET /api/comercial/summary (SALE) kpis contain total_qty=58524, total_subtotal, count_orders
Backend: GET /api/comercial/summary (RESERVA) returns lower numbers (248 qty, 11 orders - unused reservations)
Backend: GET /api/comercial/summary top_productos has modelo, marca, tipo, talla, color, qty, subtotal, orders fields
Backend: GET /api/comercial/summary top_clientes has partner_id, partner_name, qty, subtotal, orders fields
Backend: GET /api/comercial/filter-options returns marca, tipo, entalle, tela, hilo, talla, color arrays
Backend: GET /api/comercial/detail returns items, has_next, page, limit fields

Backend: GET /api/comercial/detail items have all 20 required fields (doc_tipo, order_id, line_id, fecha, partner_id, partner_name, product_product_id, product_tmpl_id, modelo, marca, tipo, entalle, tela, hilo, talla, color, barcode, qty, price_unit, subtotal)
Backend: Pagination works - page 2 has different items than page 1
Backend: Marca filter reduces results correctly
Backend: Date filter restricts results correctly
Backend: SALE doc_tipo only includes non-reservation records
Backend: RESERVA doc_tipo only includes unused reservations
Frontend: Login successful with admin@stockdash.com / admin123
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Ventas y Reservas' nav item
Frontend: /comercial page loads with data-testid='comercial-page'
Frontend: Ventas tab active by default
Frontend: Reservas tab clickable and switches data
Frontend: KPI cards display (Cantidad Total: 52,827, Subtotal: S/ 2,673,206.74, Ordenes: 5,381)
Frontend: Top 10 Productos table displays with model data
Frontend: Top 10 Clientes table displays with client data
Frontend: Detail table shows paginated data with all 13 columns
Frontend: Date filters exist (fecha_desde, fecha_hasta)
Frontend: Filter slicers exist (Marca, Tipo, Entalle, Tela, Hilo, Talla, Color)
Frontend: Modelo and Cliente text filters exist
Frontend: Pagination controls (Ant/Sig buttons) exist
action_items: CRITICAL: Add authentication to comercial router endpoints - missing Depends(get_current_user). Example fix: async def comercial_summary(..., user=Depends(get_current_user))
critical_code_review_comments: All 3 endpoints (/summary, /filter-options, /detail) are publicly accessible without token
Fix: Add 'from server import get_current_user' and 'user=Depends(get_current_user)' to each endpoint
View crm.v_comercial_mov_flat correctly filters: SALE = non-cancelled non-reservation, RESERVA = unused reservations only
Performance: summary queries take ~5s with date filters (expected for ~1M rows source view)
Frontend correctly uses debounce (400ms) for filter changes
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data from crm.v_comercial_mov_flat view
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comercial module tested. 3 endpoints: /api/comercial/summary (KPIs + top 10s), /api/comercial/filter-options (catalog arrays), /api/comercial/detail (paginated items). SECURITY ISSUE: All endpoints missing authentication. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_comercial.py (15 tests). Frontend ComercialPage.jsx has Ventas/Reservas tabs, KPI cards, Top 10 tables, Detail table with pagination. Performance is ~5s for queries. SALE shows ~52K qty, RESERVA shows ~248 qty (unused reservations only).
